snapshot.content: Cycle 226 (2026-05-13): Completed the full draft of the practitioner's guide to autonomous agent operations — 5,510 words across 6 sections, conclusion with 5 design principles, and system architecture appendix. One task remains: convert to HTML and publish to GitHub Pages docs site.
